query:
SELECT * FROM host_interests WHERE name LIKE '%Amir%' OR email LIKE '%amir%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT * FROM interest_submissions WHERE name LIKE '%Amir%' OR email LIKE '%amir%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT * FROM host_interests WHERE name LIKE '%Amir%' OR email LIKE '%amir%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT * FROM interest_submissions WHERE name LIKE '%Amir%' OR email LIKE '%amir%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
